subcodes.title: Yabo
subcodes.first_line:
## Yabo

Martaba ta tabbata ga sūnanka, yā Ubangiji Allāna! Kai nē wanda kōmi da kōwa yake bautāma, amma bā ka bautāwa k
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH04231 — Opens 'Thou art He whom all things worship' - different prayer; correct ha at 11730
